hypothesis: A capped ExECT S4 smoke run verifies Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite provider compatibility with frozen K0+K1 cause-bridge S4 variant before exect_gemini_ladder_replay_v1 full validation.
metric_caveats: This capped smoke run validates provider/config/runtime compatibility only; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S4 diagnostics (eleven families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across eleven families is not comparable to frozen S3 nine-family or S2 five-family headlines.
Operational program_variant exect_s4_field_family_cause_bridge_k0_k1_single_pass matches frozen GPT S4 default.
The model string gemini-3.1-flash-lite must be confirmed against the live Gemini API before cost or quality comparisons.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
